description: Published SIMULATOR onboard-FPV camera calibration (ADR-0021). SIM / NOT FOR FLIGHT: a simulated pinhole camera and synthetic design eye, never real HUD optics. Generated from pilotage_adapter_api::calibration::sim_fpv_calibration; canonicalBase64 is the exact canonical byte form the recorded SHA-256 is taken over. The browser recomputes the hash over these bytes and fails closed on any mismatch.
